gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 误拨语音酿奇缘，笑泪交织的跨时空浪漫。
gems.whyWatchEn: A mistaken voicemail sparks a long-distance romance, blending humor and heartfelt emotion across time and grief.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻喜剧、温情故事，以及《电子情书》等书信/语音传情经典片的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of lighthearted romantic comedies, heartfelt stories, and classic connection-through-communication films like 'You've Got Mail'.

gems.title: 宇宙巨人：希曼崛起
gems.summary: 亚当（尼古拉斯·加利齐纳 饰）在神秘圣剑的召唤下，尘封十五年的异世界王子身份觉醒，平凡人生被彻底颠覆。他跨越时空重返埃坦尼亚，但故乡早已在骷髅王的统治下分崩离析。为拯救曾经的家园与现在的世界，亚当必须再次拔出圣剑，喊出那句响彻寰宇的咒语——“赐予我力量吧！我是希曼！”
gems.summaryEn: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, A
gems.whyWatch: 经典IP硬核重启，怀旧与史诗感并存的奇幻冒险。
gems.whyWatchEn: A gritty, nostalgic reboot of the iconic franchise, blending epic fantasy with a modern hero's journey.
gems.audience: 80、90后《希曼》老粉，以及喜欢《雷霆沙赞》式中二英雄气质的奇幻动作片观众。
gems.audienceEn: 80s/90s He-Man fans and viewers who enjoy earnest, slightly campy fantasy action with a modern edge, similar to 'Shazam!'.
